items.title: AMD's RDNA 5 gaming GPUs are coming late next year, according to AIBs at Computex — manufacturers expect new Team Red cards in the second half of 2027 alongside Nvidia
items.description: AIB partners for AMD at the Computex 2026 show floor have said they expect next-gen RDNA 5 gaming GPUs to land sometime in the second half of 2027, or maybe even in early 2028. That launch schedule lines up closely with Nvidia's RTX 60 series, which is also expected in late 2027 based on current rumors.
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 6 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter Next-gen gaming GPUs from both AMD and Nvidia are expected to be announced sometime next year, following the (roughly) biennial release cadence of these cards. Tweakers, a Dutch publication present at Computex 2026, asked a few manufacturers at the show about RDNA 5 and got varying responses. In general, the AIB partners suggested that we should see new GPUs about a year from now, but some thought hardware may not hit the shelves until late 2027 or early 2028.Go deeper with TH Premium: GPUs (Image credit: Noctua)Desktop RoadmapEnterprise RoadmapRubin in-depthThe Stout Owl: The ultimate Noctua G2 PCOne manufacturer said it expects next-gen AMD graphics cards in the second or third quarter of 2027, while another said it could be pushed outside 2027 entirely and into early 2028. But there's still a chance for a late 2027 release. Keep in mind that the announcement and actual launch differ; AMD could introduce RDNA 5 in late 2027, but the GPUs might actually make it to market in early 2028, for example.AMD showed off RDNA 4 for the first time at CES 2025, while the initial models — RX 9070 and RX 9070 XT — didn't ship until March. RDNA 3 was a bit better in this regard with a November 2022 announcement and December 2022 launch period. RDNA 5 is rumored to be a major upgrade for Team Red with features like dual-issue execution in the works, so the company wouldn't want to deliver an undercooked product hastily.Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: Nvidia debuted the RTX 50 series at CES 2025 as well and current rumors point to Rubin-based gaming GPUs coming in late 2027, with the same early 2028 murmurs heard for the RTX 60 series as well. If true, both GPU makers would be closely aligned in their launch schedules, but it's simply too early to tell. The PC hardware industry is going through a turbulent time, and the volatility caused by the AI boom means that gaming GPUs are the least of these companies' concerns right now.While we're here, Intel is still in the business of making gaming-focused GPUs. It just launched the new Arc G3 family for handheld consoles featuring Panther Lake silicon, but, unfortunately, the future for dedicated graphics cards is looking a bit dire. On the console side, Xbox Helix and Sony's PS6 are still expected to at least be announced next year as, by then, it will have been seven years since the current generation launched. These systems will also be powered by next-gen AMD silicon. items.titleZh: 据Computex上的AIB厂商称，AMD的RDNA 5游戏GPU将于明年晚些时候推出——制造商预计新的Team Red显卡将在2027年下半年与Nvidia一同亮相。
items.descriptionZh:
根据荷兰媒体Tweakers在Computex 2026展会上对多家AIB（显卡合作伙伴）厂商的采访，关于下一代游戏GPU——AMD RDNA 5和Nvidia RTX 60系列——的发布时间出现了分歧。大多数厂商认为新显卡大约一年后（即2026年底至2027年初）会面世，但也有声音指出硬件可能要到2027年底甚至2028年初才能上市。具体来看，一家厂商预计AMD下一代显卡将在2027年第二或第三季度推出，而另一家则认为可能完全拖出2027年，延至2028年初。不过仍存在2027年底发布的可能性。需要注意的是，产品发布与实际上架销售之间存在时间差：比如AMD可能在2027年底宣布RDNA 5，但显卡实际铺货要到2028年初。回顾历史，AMD在CES 2025上首次展示RDNA 4，但RX 9070和RX 9070 XT直到2025年3月才发货；而RDNA 3则是在2022年11月宣布、12月上市，节奏稍好。传闻RDNA 5将是重大升级，正在开发双发射执行（dual-issue execution）等特性，因此AMD不愿匆忙推出不成熟的产品。

英伟达方面，RTX 50系列同样在CES 2025亮相，目前传闻基于Rubin架构的游戏GPU将在2027年底发布，而RTX 60系列也有类似延至2028年初的说法。如果成真，两家GPU厂商的发布时间表将高度对齐，但现阶段下结论为时过早。PC硬件行业正经历动荡期，AI热潮带来的波动意味着游戏GPU目前并非这些公司的首要关注点。

此外，英特尔仍在制造游戏级GPU，刚刚推出了基于Panther Lake芯片的Arc G3系列，专为掌机设计。但独立显卡的未来前景略显黯淡。在主机端，Xbox Helix和索尼PS6预计至少会在2027年宣布，因为届时距离本世代主机发布已过去七年。这些系统也将由AMD的下一代芯片驱动。

items.title: Google signs $920M monthly compute deal with SpaceX — company’s projected annual data center revenue to exceed its combined proceeds from Starlink, launch services, and AI in 2025
items.description: Google's $920-million-a-month deal with SpaceX will let it secure 110,000 Nvidia GPUs starting October 2026. This is the second data center deal that SpaceX has secured in a matter of weeks, especially as it's quickly approaching its IPO on June 12, 2026.
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 4 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter SpaceX just announced that it closed a multi-year deal to provide compute capacity to Google. The agreement, which is worth $920 million per month, will begin in October 2026 and is expected to continue until June 2029. Reuters said that the transaction includes 110,000 Nvidia GPUs, plus CPUs, memory, and all other components needed for AI processing.It appears that Elon Musk's company will not deliver the entire 110,000-strong GPU compute capacity in one go — Google will pay a reduced monthly fee as the company brings more server racks online through September 30, 2027. If SpaceX cannot hit the 110,000-GPU target on that date plus a one-month grace period, then Google can cancel the agreement or settle for the lower number of available GPUs “with a corresponding pro-rata reduction in the monthly fees.” It also gave the two parties the option to cancel the deal altogether after December 31, 2027, provided that they give a 90-day notice to the other.This is the second major deal that SpaceX announced in months, as Anthropic secured the entire computing power of SpaceX’s Colossus 1 data center in early May. This was a surprising move, especially as Colossus 1 is one of the company’s most hyped assets, which Elon Musk launched in just 19 days. It turns out that launching it at such speed meant that it has a mix of H100, H200, and GB200 GPUs, which is resulting in efficiencies for training AI LLMs as the faster GB200 GPUs end up waiting for the older, slower GPUs before it can complete each computational step. Anthropic is instead using it for inferencing, especially as it is struggling to keep up with the demands of its growing user base.Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: The combined annual value of just these two deals is already worth more than SpaceX’s entire revenue for 2025. Reuters estimated that they would bring in more than $25 billion annually to the company, compared to the less than $20 billion that it made from Starlink, launch services, and AI revenue.These massive deals, worth more than $70 billion in total, will lift SpaceX as it targets a $1.75 trillion IPO on June 12, 2026. While it started out as a space exploration company and is known for commercially launching satellites at a fraction of the cost compared to NASA and providing relatively affordable and stable satellite internet, it’s actively expanding towards orbital data centers. SpaceX acquired xAI earlier this year to help achieve that dream and has even filed some documents at the FCC detailing its plans. Google is also reportedly in talks with the company for a slice of the orbital data center pie. items.author: Jowi Morales
items.titleZh: 谷歌与SpaceX签署每月9.2亿美元计算服务协议——该公司预计2025年数据中心年收入将超过其来自星链、发射服务和AI的总收入
items.descriptionZh:
SpaceX与谷歌达成了一项价值数十亿美元的多年期协议，将为后者提供大规模AI计算能力。根据协议，从2026年10月开始至2029年6月，SpaceX每月将向谷歌提供价值9.2亿美元的计算资源，总价值超过70亿美元。这笔交易包含11万块Nvidia GPU，以及CPU、内存和AI处理所需的全部组件。

这并非一次性交付——谷歌将按比例支付月费，随着SpaceX在2027年9月30日前逐步增加服务器机架，费用会相应降低。如果SpaceX未能在此日期（加一个月宽限期）前达到11万块GPU的目标，谷歌有权取消协议，或按实际可用GPU数量按比例降低月费。此外，双方可在2027年12月31日后选择完全终止合同，但需提前90天通知对方。

这是SpaceX数月内宣布的第二笔重大交易。此前，Anthropic在5月初获得了SpaceX Colossus 1数据中心的全部算力。这一举动令人意外，因为Colossus 1是SpaceX最受关注的资产之一，埃隆·马斯克仅用19天就建成。但如此快速的部署也带来了隐患：该数据中心混合使用了H100、H200和GB200三种GPU，导致AI大语言模型训练效率低下——更快的GB200 GPU不得不等待较旧的H100/H200完成每个计算步骤。Anthropic因此将其用于推理（inference）任务，以应对其快速增长的用户需求。

这两笔交易的年化价值合计已超过SpaceX 2025年的总收入。路透社估计，它们每年将为SpaceX带来超过250亿美元的收入，远超其从星链、发射服务和AI业务获得的不足200亿美元。

这些总价值超过700亿美元的协议将极大提升SpaceX的估值，该公司正计划于2026年6月12日进行高达1.75万亿美元的IPO。虽然SpaceX最初是一家太空探索公司，以远低于NASA的成本发射商业卫星和提供相对廉价稳定的卫星互联网而闻名，但如今它正积极向轨道数据中心领域扩展。SpaceX今年早些时候收购了xAI以助实现这一愿景，并已向FCC提交了相关计划文件。据报道，谷歌也在与SpaceX洽谈，希望获得轨道数据中心的一部分计算能力。

items.title: Ludicrous overclock slams 1.7 volts into 6700K in an attempt to stop CPU from bottlenecking an RTX 3080 — 5.2 GHz on aging four-core pushes GPU utilization from 60% to 74%
items.description: YouTuber challenges himself to alleviate a CPU bottleneck with a Core i7-6700K paired with an RTX 3080 through overclocking.
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 3 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter The Core i7-6700K was once one of Intel’s best CPUs for gaming, but fast forward to 2026, and the decade-old chip is now hardly an optimal choice to pair with any modern GPU hardware, including some entry-level graphics cards. Despite this, YouTuber TrashBench put the 6700K to the test and challenged himself to see if he could overcome CPU bottlenecking with an RTX 3080 purely through overclocking.In his tests, the YouTuber pushed the Core i7-6700K to its absolute limit, exceeding safe voltage limits in an attempt to achieve his goal. Three overclocks were tested: a 4.7GHz overclock at 1.4v, a 5GHz overclock at 1.56v, and a 5.1GHz overclock at 1.65v. The YouTuber even attempted 5.2 GHz and 5.3 GHz overclocks with a vcore of 1.7 V, but sadly, neither attempt was successful. As for cooling, the 4.7GHz overclock was achieved with an air cooler, while the 5GHz and 5.1GHz overclocks were achieved using a custom loop submerged in an ice bath. I Gave an Old CPU Max Volts to Feed a 3080 - YouTube Watch On At stock speeds, the 6700K was barely able to get the RTX 3080 above 60% utilization in Cyberpunk 2077, with an average of 103 FPS. With the 4.7GHz overclock, the bottlenecking situation noticeably improved, with the RTX 3080 achieving nearly 70% utilization, resulting in 13% higher performance compared to stock. At 5GHz, the 6700K improved the RTX 3080’s utilization to 74%, with Cyberpunk 2077 performance improving by 17%. Finally, at 5.1GHz, the fastest overclock unfortunately yielded the least impressive result, improving performance by just 1 FPS compared to Cyberpunk 2077 running at 5GHz on the 6700K.Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: The YouTuber also tested several other games featuring Shadow of the Tomb Raider, Hitman 3, and Far Cry 6. 3DMark Time Spy was also thrown in as a synthetic test. With air cooling at 4.7GHz, all of the aforementioned titles achieved an average performance gain of 7% compared to stock. In 3DMark Time Spy, the results were far different, with the 4.7GHz overclock achieving a whopping 19% performance improvement over stock. For the 5GHz ice-cooled results, performance improved by 11.3% on average over stock across the same three titles, and in 3DMark, the results showed a 24% improvement over stock.The YouTuber unfortunately failed to achieve his goal of stopping CPU bottlenecking with a 6700K on an RTX 3080 through CPU overclocking alone. However, the overclocking results demonstrate that the Skylake flagship is still a capable gaming CPU, achieving around 100 FPS in all of the aforementioned games at 5 or 5.1GHz. items.author: Aaron Klotz
items.titleZh: 疯狂超频给6700K强行施加1.7伏电压，试图阻止CPU拖累RTX 3080——老旧的四核处理器频率达5.2 GHz，显卡占用率从60%提升至74%
items.descriptionZh:
YouTube博主TrashBench近日进行了一项极限实验：将2015年发布的Intel Core i7-6700K（Skylake架构旗舰）通过超频推至极限，试图消除其与RTX 3080显卡搭配时出现的CPU瓶颈。i7-6700K曾是顶级游戏CPU，但到2026年，这款已有十年历史的芯片已无法充分发挥现代显卡的性能，甚至包括某些入门级型号。然而，TrashBench仍希望证明，仅靠CPU超频能否让这颗老将“喂饱”RTX 3080。

实验中，TrashBench将Core i7-6700K的电压推至远超安全值。他测试了三组超频设置：4.7GHz（核心电压1.4V，风冷）、5GHz（1.56V，定制水冷+冰水浴）和5.1GHz（1.65V，同样冰水冷却）。他还尝试了5.2GHz和5.3GHz，电压达到惊人的1.7V，但均未成功。散热方面，4.7GHz使用普通风冷，而5GHz和5.1GHz则依赖浸入冰水中的定制水冷回路。

测试成绩如下：在默认频率下，i7-6700K在《赛博朋克2077》中仅能让RTX 3080的利用率达到约60%，平均帧率为103 FPS。超频至4.7GHz后，利用率提升至近70%，性能比默认提高13%。5GHz下，利用率达到74%，性能提升17%。而5.1GHz的超频却令人意外——仅比5GHz多出1 FPS，提升微乎其微。在其他游戏中（《古墓丽影：暗影》《杀手3》《孤岛危机6》），4.7GHz风冷超频带来平均7%的性能提升；而在3DMark Time Spy理论测试中，4.7GHz超频竟取得19%的增益。5GHz冰水冷却下，上述三款游戏平均性能提升11.3%，3DMark提升24%。

尽管TrashBench未能实现“完全消除CPU瓶颈”的目标（RTX 3080利用率仍远未满载），但实验结果证明，Skylake旗舰CPU在极限超频后仍具备不俗的游戏能力——在所有测试游戏中均可稳定达到约100 FPS。从技术角度看，这次实验展示了老一代CPU通过超高电压和极端散热（如冰水浴）可挖掘的潜力，但也揭示了其物理极限：1.7V的电压尝试不仅失败，还可能对芯片造成永久损伤。对于仍在使用i7-6700K的用户而言，极限超频可有效缓解CPU瓶颈，但已无法与当代中高端CPU相提并论。该实验的应用场景主要指向极限超频爱好者及延寿老平台的需求，而非主流游戏配置的推荐方案。

items.title: AMD reaches almost 45% CPU share in the latest Steam Hardware Survey for Windows gaming PCs — Ryzen is steadily gaining ground against Intel's legacy domination
items.description: The latest Steam Hardware Survey is out and it's showing positive signs of growth for AMD, while Intel is unfortunately on a decline. The Red Team posted its best-ever CPU market share numbers in May 2026 with 45% of all CPUs on Windows being from AMD, while Intel is down to 55%, which is still more for now.
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 8 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter Valve released the Steam Hardware Survey for May 2026, revealing insight into PC gaming trends and patterns that define the industry. As always, we have data on how much RAM people have, what GPUs are the most popular, etc., but perhaps the most interesting bit of info is the CPU usage. AMD has now reached 46.06% share on Steam across all platforms, with almost 45% of Windows PCs using AMD processors.The exact number for Windows is 44.97%, so we're counting that as 45% for AMD, while Intel is at 55.02% for the month of May. Compared to April, that's a 0.79% drop for the Blue Team, while also a 0.79% gain for the Red Team. Compared to the start of the year, in January, AMD only held 43.34% of the share while Intel accounted for 56.64%, so the patterns either way are being reinforced. (Image credit: Future)AMD keeps climbing the charts while Intel's lead is on a steady decline. It still has the biggest slice of the pie because of the sheer legacy left behind, and since AMD only became competitive in 2017. That was the year the first mainstream Ryzen chips came out and challenged Intel for the throne.Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: AMD planted the seeds of the Zen architecture during its darkest years, and that multi-year gamble has borne fruit to the point that the data now reflects it. To be clear, Intel is also very competitive these days, especially on the mobile front with Panther Lake and with the upcoming Nova Lake family set to take a true generational leap for desktop.Most recently, the advent of 3D V-Cache has helped AMD secure the gaming segment with chips that consistently outperform other offerings. The company has released several X3D variants of its existing CPUs for both current and older generations, such as the newly announced 10th Anniversary Edition of the 5800X3D, the chip that started it all. On the other hand, we have the 9950X3D2 with extra cache stacked underneath both its 8-core CCDs for the first time in Ryzen history. items.author: Hassam Nasir
items.titleZh: AMD在最新Steam硬件调查中CPU份额接近45%——Ryzen正稳步蚕食英特尔的传统主导地位
items.descriptionZh:
Valve 发布了 2026 年 5 月的 Steam 硬件调查报告，揭示了 PC 游戏领域的硬件趋势和行业格局。其中最引人注目的变化是 CPU 使用率数据：AMD 在所有平台（包括 Windows、Linux 和 SteamOS）上的总份额已达到 46.06%，而在 Windows 平台上，AMD 处理器占比为 44.97%（接近 45%），Intel 则为 55.02%。与 4 月相比，Intel 份额下降了 0.79%，AMD 相应上升了 0.79%；而在今年 1 月，AMD 仅占 43.34%，Intel 为 56.64%，这一趋势正在持续强化。

这一变化的根源在于 AMD 从 2017 年起凭借初代 Ryzen 处理器重返高性能市场，其 Zen 架构是在公司最艰难的时期播下的种子，经过多年积累，如今终于体现在市场数据上。尽管 Intel 目前仍凭借庞大的历史存量占据最大份额，但 AMD 的持续攀升已经不可忽视。值得强调的是，Intel 在移动平台（如 Panther Lake）和即将到来的桌面 Nova Lake 家族中同样具有强劲竞争力，后者有望实现真正的代际飞跃。

在技术层面，AMD 的 3D V-Cache 技术成为其在游戏领域制胜的关键。该技术通过在 CPU 芯片上垂直堆叠额外的 L3 缓存（即“3D 缓存”），显著降低内存延迟，提升游戏帧率，使搭载该技术的 X3D 系列处理器持续领先竞品。AMD 已为多代 CPU 推出了 X3D 变体，包括刚刚发布的 5800X3D 十周年纪念版（这款芯片是 3D V-Cache 的开山之作），以及 9950X3D2——这是 Ryzen 历史上首次在其两个 8 核 CCD 下方均堆叠了额外缓存。这些产品的性能表现和差异化设计进一步巩固了 AMD 在游戏玩家心中的地位。

除了消费级市场，AMD 在服务器 x86 CPU 领域也取得了相似进展，凭借 EPYC 系列达到了约 46% 的收入份额。该产品线即将在 2026 年迎来 Venice 架构的刷新，并在 2027 年推出 Verano 架构。这些数据表明，AMD 正在从消费端到企业端全面崛起，而这场由 Zen 架构引发的竞争正在重塑整个 x86 处理器市场格局。对于 PC 游戏玩家而言，这意味着更丰富的选择、更具竞争力的价格，以及持续创新的技术红利；对行业而言，则预示着双雄争霸的格局将推动更快的技术迭代。

items.title: NVIDIA, KRAFTON, NC and Reigning ‘League of Legends’ Champions T1 Celebrate RTX Spark at Korea’s PC Bangs
items.description: At GTC Taipei at COMPUTEX last week, NVIDIA unveiled RTX Spark, the superchip that reinvents Windows PCs for the era of personal AI agents. On the heels of this announcement, NVIDIA founder and CEO Jensen Huang headed to South Korea, where he introduced RTX Spark to the nation’s passionate gaming community. Leading game developers — […]
items.content: At GTC Taipei at COMPUTEX last week, NVIDIA unveiled RTX Spark, the superchip that reinvents Windows PCs for the era of personal AI agents. On the heels of this announcement, NVIDIA founder and CEO Jensen Huang headed to South Korea, where he introduced RTX Spark to the nation’s passionate gaming community. Leading game developers — including Korea’s KRAFTON and NC — are already working to bring their titles to RTX Spark-powered systems. Designed for local AI, creating and gaming, RTX Spark brings together 30 years of NVIDIA innovation to slim Windows laptops with all-day battery life and small, ultraefficient desktop PCs. With the superchip, gamers can play AAA games at 1440p resolution and over 100 frames per second with NVIDIA ray tracing, DLSS and Reflex technologies. In addition, RTX Spark supports all NVIDIA RTX technologies, including the recently announced DLSS 4.5 Ray Reconstruction, which features a second-generation transformer model for realistic image quality. RTX Spark Ignites Korea’s Gaming Community Korea has played a major role in spearheading esports and driving the boom in PC bangs, or internet and gaming cafes. With longstanding collaborations rooted in the country, NVIDIA in October celebrated 25 years of GeForce in Korea with a free festival for gamers, highlighting the rich gaming ecosystem that has been built over decades. On Friday, Huang headed to T1 Base Camp — a PC bang owned by T1, one of Korea’s top esports teams. There, he met with T1’s reigning League of Legends World Champion team, including six-time World Champion Lee “Faker” Sang-hyeok to unveil RTX Spark. NVIDIA and Riot Games — developer of League of Legends — are collaborating to bring the title as well as VALORANT to RTX Spark, expanding gamers’ access to high-performance gaming on slim laptops. To mark the occasion, T1 Base Camp attendees had the chance to win RTX Spark laptops, League of Legends and T1 merch signed by Huang and Faker, as well as GeForce RTX 5090 GPUs. Surprising PC-Bang Gamers Later, Huang headed to Seoul’s Gangnam district, where he surprised PC-bang gamers with a first look at RTX Spark with KRAFTON and NC. At the first stop, Optimum Zone PC, Huang and KRAFTON Chairman Byung-gyu Chang showcased PUBG: BATTLEGROUNDS and Subnautica 2 on RTX Spark to a captivated crowd of gamers. Gamers then got the surprise chance to play with the unreleased PUBG Ally, a co-playable character built with NVIDIA ACE technologies on RTX Spark laptops. PUBG Ally resulted from AI research and development at KRAFTON and NVIDIA, part of an initiative to create next-generation game characters that act like teammates and enable more meaningful, immersive engagements with players. Next, Huang stopped at another PC bang, Portal PC, where he showcased NC’s CINDER CITY and AION 2 on RTX Spark, with support from Taekjin Kim, co-CEO of NC. NC and NVIDIA began working together in the early 2000s on the Lineage franchise and have since collaborated to integrate RTX technology into many of NC’s flagship games, including Lineage 2, AION, Blade & Soul, AION 2 and CINDER CITY. Gamers at Portal PC were given the chance to play a demo of NC’s highly anticipated open-world massively multiplayer online tactical shooter CINDER CITY on GeForce RTX-powered PCs. CINDER CITY will support the DLSS 4.5 Dynamic Multi Frame Generation and Super Resolution features at launch. Plus, gamers will be able to experience the title on slim RTX Spark laptops and compact desktops when the game is released later this year. In addition to KRAFTON, NC, and Riot Games, 100+ Windows software providers and game developers are embracing RTX Spark. These partners include NetEase, Remedy Entertainment and XBOX. Learn more about RTX Spark and its launch partners.
items.author: Jangho Park
items.titleZh: NVIDIA、KRAFTON、NC以及卫冕《英雄联盟》冠军T1在韩国PC房庆祝RTX Spark
items.descriptionZh:
在刚刚结束的COMPUTEX台北电脑展的GTC Taipei活动上，NVIDIA正式发布了RTX Spark超级芯片，这一产品被定位为重塑Windows PC、迎接个人AI代理时代的里程碑式创新。随后，NVIDIA创始人兼首席执行官黄仁勋亲赴韩国，向该国充满热情的游戏社区介绍了RTX Spark。韩国顶尖游戏开发商——包括KRAFTON和NC——已率先着手将旗下游戏适配至RTX Spark驱动的系统。RTX Spark专为本地AI计算、内容创作和游戏打造，融合了NVIDIA三十年的技术积累，能够实现拥有全天续航的轻薄Windows笔记本以及体积小巧、能效极高的台式机。借助这款超芯片，玩家可以在1440p分辨率下以超过100帧每秒的流畅度运行AAA级游戏，同时享受NVIDIA光线追踪、DLSS和Reflex技术带来的画质与响应速度提升。此外，RTX Spark支持所有NVIDIA RTX技术，包括最新发布的DLSS 4.5光线重建（Ray Reconstruction），该功能采用第二代Transformer模型，可呈现极为逼真的图像质量。

### RTX Spark点燃韩国游戏社区

韩国在推动电子竞技发展和PC房（互联网与游戏咖啡馆）繁荣方面一直扮演着关键角色。基于与韩国长期的合作关系，NVIDIA于今年10月举办了GeForce在韩国25周年的免费玩家庆典，彰显了数十年来构建的丰富游戏生态。上周五，黄仁勋到访了韩国顶级电竞战队T1旗下的PC房——T1 Base Camp。在那里，他会见了T1的《英雄联盟》世界冠军战队成员，包括六冠王李相赫（Faker），并正式揭晓了RTX Spark。NVIDIA与《英雄联盟》的开发商Riot Games正在合作，将《英雄联盟》以及《无畏契约》（VALORANT）引入RTX Spark平台，让更多玩家能在轻薄笔记本上享受高性能游戏体验。为庆祝这一时刻，T1 Base Camp的参与者有机会赢得RTX Spark笔记本、《英雄联盟》及T1周边（由黄仁勋和Faker亲笔签名），以及GeForce RTX 5090 GPU。

### 突袭PC房，与玩家零距离

随后，黄仁勋前往首尔江南区，与KRAFTON和NC一同为PC房玩家带来了RTX Spark的首秀惊喜。第一站是Optimum Zone PC，黄仁勋与KRAFTON董事长张炳圭（Byung-gyu Chang）在RTX Spark上向围观玩家展示了《PUBG：绝地求生》和《深海迷航2》（Subnautica 2）。玩家们还意外获得了与尚未发布的PUBG Ally互动的机会——这是一款基于NVIDIA ACE技术构建的、可在RTX Spark笔记本上运行的协作型角色。PUBG Ally是KRAFTON与NVIDIA在AI研发领域的合作成果，该计划旨在打造能够像队友一样行动、与玩家进行更有意义、更具沉浸感的互动的下一代游戏角色。

接下来，黄仁勋来到另一家PC房Portal PC，与NC共同首席执行官金泽镇（Taekjin Kim）一起，在RTX Spark上展示了NC的《灰烬之城》（CINDER CITY）和《永恒之塔2》（AION 2）。NC与NVIDIA的合作始于21世纪初的《天堂》系列，此后双方持续将RTX技术整合到NC的多款旗舰游戏中，包括《天堂2》、《永恒之塔》、《剑灵》、《永恒之塔2》和《灰烬之城》。Portal PC的玩家有机会在GeForce RTX驱动的PC上试玩NC备受期待的开放世界大型多人在线战术射击游戏《灰烬之城》的Demo版本。《灰烬之城》将在发布时支持DLSS 4.5动态多帧生成和超分辨率功能。此外，当该游戏于今年晚些时候正式发售后，玩家将能够在轻薄的RTX Spark笔记本和小型台式机上体验这款作品。

除了KRAFTON、NC和Riot Games，还有超过100家Windows软件提供商和游戏开发商正在拥抱RTX Spark，其中包括网易（NetEase）、Remedy Entertainment和Xbox。更多关于RTX Spark及其首发合作伙伴的信息，请访问NVIDIA官网。

history.title: AMD's RDNA 5 gaming GPUs are coming late next year, according to AIBs at Computex — manufacturers expect new Team Red cards in the second half of 2027 alongside Nvidia
history.description: AIB partners for AMD at the Computex 2026 show floor have said they expect next-gen RDNA 5 gaming GPUs to land sometime in the second half of 2027, or maybe even in early 2028. That launch schedule lines up closely with Nvidia's RTX 60 series, which is also expected in late 2027 based on current rumors.
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 6 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter Next-gen gaming GPUs from both AMD and Nvidia are expected to be announced sometime next year, following the (roughly) biennial release cadence of these cards. Tweakers, a Dutch publication present at Computex 2026, asked a few manufacturers at the show about RDNA 5 and got varying responses. In general, the AIB partners suggested that we should see new GPUs about a year from now, but some thought hardware may not hit the shelves until late 2027 or early 2028.Go deeper with TH Premium: GPUs (Image credit: Noctua)Desktop RoadmapEnterprise RoadmapRubin in-depthThe Stout Owl: The ultimate Noctua G2 PCOne manufacturer said it expects next-gen AMD graphics cards in the second or third quarter of 2027, while another said it could be pushed outside 2027 entirely and into early 2028. But there's still a chance for a late 2027 release. Keep in mind that the announcement and actual launch differ; AMD could introduce RDNA 5 in late 2027, but the GPUs might actually make it to market in early 2028, for example.AMD showed off RDNA 4 for the first time at CES 2025, while the initial models — RX 9070 and RX 9070 XT — didn't ship until March. RDNA 3 was a bit better in this regard with a November 2022 announcement and December 2022 launch period. RDNA 5 is rumored to be a major upgrade for Team Red with features like dual-issue execution in the works, so the company wouldn't want to deliver an undercooked product hastily.Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: Nvidia debuted the RTX 50 series at CES 2025 as well and current rumors point to Rubin-based gaming GPUs coming in late 2027, with the same early 2028 murmurs heard for the RTX 60 series as well. If true, both GPU makers would be closely aligned in their launch schedules, but it's simply too early to tell. The PC hardware industry is going through a turbulent time, and the volatility caused by the AI boom means that gaming GPUs are the least of these companies' concerns right now.While we're here, Intel is still in the business of making gaming-focused GPUs. It just launched the new Arc G3 family for handheld consoles featuring Panther Lake silicon, but, unfortunately, the future for dedicated graphics cards is looking a bit dire. On the console side, Xbox Helix and Sony's PS6 are still expected to at least be announced next year as, by then, it will have been seven years since the current generation launched. These systems will also be powered by next-gen AMD silicon. history.author: Hassam Nasir
history.titleZh: 据Computex上的AIB厂商称，AMD的RDNA 5游戏GPU将于明年晚些时候推出——制造商预计新的Team Red显卡将在2027年下半年与Nvidia一同亮相。
history.descriptionZh:
根据荷兰媒体Tweakers在Computex 2026展会上对多家AIB（显卡合作伙伴）厂商的采访，关于下一代游戏GPU——AMD RDNA 5和Nvidia RTX 60系列——的发布时间出现了分歧。大多数厂商认为新显卡大约一年后（即2026年底至2027年初）会面世，但也有声音指出硬件可能要到2027年底甚至2028年初才能上市。具体来看，一家厂商预计AMD下一代显卡将在2027年第二或第三季度推出，而另一家则认为可能完全拖出2027年，延至2028年初。不过仍存在2027年底发布的可能性。需要注意的是，产品发布与实际上架销售之间存在时间差：比如AMD可能在2027年底宣布RDNA 5，但显卡实际铺货要到2028年初。回顾历史，AMD在CES 2025上首次展示RDNA 4，但RX 9070和RX 9070 XT直到2025年3月才发货；而RDNA 3则是在2022年11月宣布、12月上市，节奏稍好。传闻RDNA 5将是重大升级，正在开发双发射执行（dual-issue execution）等特性，因此AMD不愿匆忙推出不成熟的产品。

英伟达方面，RTX 50系列同样在CES 2025亮相，目前传闻基于Rubin架构的游戏GPU将在2027年底发布，而RTX 60系列也有类似延至2028年初的说法。如果成真，两家GPU厂商的发布时间表将高度对齐，但现阶段下结论为时过早。PC硬件行业正经历动荡期，AI热潮带来的波动意味着游戏GPU目前并非这些公司的首要关注点。

此外，英特尔仍在制造游戏级GPU，刚刚推出了基于Panther Lake芯片的Arc G3系列，专为掌机设计。但独立显卡的未来前景略显黯淡。在主机端，Xbox Helix和索尼PS6预计至少会在2027年宣布，因为届时距离本世代主机发布已过去七年。这些系统也将由AMD的下一代芯片驱动。

history.title: Google signs $920M monthly compute deal with SpaceX — company’s projected annual data center revenue to exceed its combined proceeds from Starlink, launch services, and AI in 2025
history.description: Google's $920-million-a-month deal with SpaceX will let it secure 110,000 Nvidia GPUs starting October 2026. This is the second data center deal that SpaceX has secured in a matter of weeks, especially as it's quickly approaching its IPO on June 12, 2026.
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 4 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter SpaceX just announced that it closed a multi-year deal to provide compute capacity to Google. The agreement, which is worth $920 million per month, will begin in October 2026 and is expected to continue until June 2029. Reuters said that the transaction includes 110,000 Nvidia GPUs, plus CPUs, memory, and all other components needed for AI processing.It appears that Elon Musk's company will not deliver the entire 110,000-strong GPU compute capacity in one go — Google will pay a reduced monthly fee as the company brings more server racks online through September 30, 2027. If SpaceX cannot hit the 110,000-GPU target on that date plus a one-month grace period, then Google can cancel the agreement or settle for the lower number of available GPUs “with a corresponding pro-rata reduction in the monthly fees.” It also gave the two parties the option to cancel the deal altogether after December 31, 2027, provided that they give a 90-day notice to the other.This is the second major deal that SpaceX announced in months, as Anthropic secured the entire computing power of SpaceX’s Colossus 1 data center in early May. This was a surprising move, especially as Colossus 1 is one of the company’s most hyped assets, which Elon Musk launched in just 19 days. It turns out that launching it at such speed meant that it has a mix of H100, H200, and GB200 GPUs, which is resulting in efficiencies for training AI LLMs as the faster GB200 GPUs end up waiting for the older, slower GPUs before it can complete each computational step. Anthropic is instead using it for inferencing, especially as it is struggling to keep up with the demands of its growing user base.Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: The combined annual value of just these two deals is already worth more than SpaceX’s entire revenue for 2025. Reuters estimated that they would bring in more than $25 billion annually to the company, compared to the less than $20 billion that it made from Starlink, launch services, and AI revenue.These massive deals, worth more than $70 billion in total, will lift SpaceX as it targets a $1.75 trillion IPO on June 12, 2026. While it started out as a space exploration company and is known for commercially launching satellites at a fraction of the cost compared to NASA and providing relatively affordable and stable satellite internet, it’s actively expanding towards orbital data centers. SpaceX acquired xAI earlier this year to help achieve that dream and has even filed some documents at the FCC detailing its plans. Google is also reportedly in talks with the company for a slice of the orbital data center pie. history.author: Jowi Morales
history.titleZh: 谷歌与SpaceX签署每月9.2亿美元计算服务协议——该公司预计2025年数据中心年收入将超过其来自星链、发射服务和AI的总收入
history.descriptionZh:
SpaceX与谷歌达成了一项价值数十亿美元的多年期协议，将为后者提供大规模AI计算能力。根据协议，从2026年10月开始至2029年6月，SpaceX每月将向谷歌提供价值9.2亿美元的计算资源，总价值超过70亿美元。这笔交易包含11万块Nvidia GPU，以及CPU、内存和AI处理所需的全部组件。

这并非一次性交付——谷歌将按比例支付月费，随着SpaceX在2027年9月30日前逐步增加服务器机架，费用会相应降低。如果SpaceX未能在此日期（加一个月宽限期）前达到11万块GPU的目标，谷歌有权取消协议，或按实际可用GPU数量按比例降低月费。此外，双方可在2027年12月31日后选择完全终止合同，但需提前90天通知对方。

这是SpaceX数月内宣布的第二笔重大交易。此前，Anthropic在5月初获得了SpaceX Colossus 1数据中心的全部算力。这一举动令人意外，因为Colossus 1是SpaceX最受关注的资产之一，埃隆·马斯克仅用19天就建成。但如此快速的部署也带来了隐患：该数据中心混合使用了H100、H200和GB200三种GPU，导致AI大语言模型训练效率低下——更快的GB200 GPU不得不等待较旧的H100/H200完成每个计算步骤。Anthropic因此将其用于推理（inference）任务，以应对其快速增长的用户需求。

这两笔交易的年化价值合计已超过SpaceX 2025年的总收入。路透社估计，它们每年将为SpaceX带来超过250亿美元的收入，远超其从星链、发射服务和AI业务获得的不足200亿美元。

这些总价值超过700亿美元的协议将极大提升SpaceX的估值，该公司正计划于2026年6月12日进行高达1.75万亿美元的IPO。虽然SpaceX最初是一家太空探索公司，以远低于NASA的成本发射商业卫星和提供相对廉价稳定的卫星互联网而闻名，但如今它正积极向轨道数据中心领域扩展。SpaceX今年早些时候收购了xAI以助实现这一愿景，并已向FCC提交了相关计划文件。据报道，谷歌也在与SpaceX洽谈，希望获得轨道数据中心的一部分计算能力。

history.title: Ludicrous overclock slams 1.7 volts into 6700K in an attempt to stop CPU from bottlenecking an RTX 3080 — 5.2 GHz on aging four-core pushes GPU utilization from 60% to 74%
history.description: YouTuber challenges himself to alleviate a CPU bottleneck with a Core i7-6700K paired with an RTX 3080 through overclocking.
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 3 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter The Core i7-6700K was once one of Intel’s best CPUs for gaming, but fast forward to 2026, and the decade-old chip is now hardly an optimal choice to pair with any modern GPU hardware, including some entry-level graphics cards. Despite this, YouTuber TrashBench put the 6700K to the test and challenged himself to see if he could overcome CPU bottlenecking with an RTX 3080 purely through overclocking.In his tests, the YouTuber pushed the Core i7-6700K to its absolute limit, exceeding safe voltage limits in an attempt to achieve his goal. Three overclocks were tested: a 4.7GHz overclock at 1.4v, a 5GHz overclock at 1.56v, and a 5.1GHz overclock at 1.65v. The YouTuber even attempted 5.2 GHz and 5.3 GHz overclocks with a vcore of 1.7 V, but sadly, neither attempt was successful. As for cooling, the 4.7GHz overclock was achieved with an air cooler, while the 5GHz and 5.1GHz overclocks were achieved using a custom loop submerged in an ice bath. I Gave an Old CPU Max Volts to Feed a 3080 - YouTube Watch On At stock speeds, the 6700K was barely able to get the RTX 3080 above 60% utilization in Cyberpunk 2077, with an average of 103 FPS. With the 4.7GHz overclock, the bottlenecking situation noticeably improved, with the RTX 3080 achieving nearly 70% utilization, resulting in 13% higher performance compared to stock. At 5GHz, the 6700K improved the RTX 3080’s utilization to 74%, with Cyberpunk 2077 performance improving by 17%. Finally, at 5.1GHz, the fastest overclock unfortunately yielded the least impressive result, improving performance by just 1 FPS compared to Cyberpunk 2077 running at 5GHz on the 6700K.Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: The YouTuber also tested several other games featuring Shadow of the Tomb Raider, Hitman 3, and Far Cry 6. 3DMark Time Spy was also thrown in as a synthetic test. With air cooling at 4.7GHz, all of the aforementioned titles achieved an average performance gain of 7% compared to stock. In 3DMark Time Spy, the results were far different, with the 4.7GHz overclock achieving a whopping 19% performance improvement over stock. For the 5GHz ice-cooled results, performance improved by 11.3% on average over stock across the same three titles, and in 3DMark, the results showed a 24% improvement over stock.The YouTuber unfortunately failed to achieve his goal of stopping CPU bottlenecking with a 6700K on an RTX 3080 through CPU overclocking alone. However, the overclocking results demonstrate that the Skylake flagship is still a capable gaming CPU, achieving around 100 FPS in all of the aforementioned games at 5 or 5.1GHz. history.author: Aaron Klotz
history.titleZh: 疯狂超频给6700K强行施加1.7伏电压，试图阻止CPU拖累RTX 3080——老旧的四核处理器频率达5.2 GHz，显卡占用率从60%提升至74%
history.descriptionZh:
YouTube博主TrashBench近日进行了一项极限实验：将2015年发布的Intel Core i7-6700K（Skylake架构旗舰）通过超频推至极限，试图消除其与RTX 3080显卡搭配时出现的CPU瓶颈。i7-6700K曾是顶级游戏CPU，但到2026年，这款已有十年历史的芯片已无法充分发挥现代显卡的性能，甚至包括某些入门级型号。然而，TrashBench仍希望证明，仅靠CPU超频能否让这颗老将“喂饱”RTX 3080。

实验中，TrashBench将Core i7-6700K的电压推至远超安全值。他测试了三组超频设置：4.7GHz（核心电压1.4V，风冷）、5GHz（1.56V，定制水冷+冰水浴）和5.1GHz（1.65V，同样冰水冷却）。他还尝试了5.2GHz和5.3GHz，电压达到惊人的1.7V，但均未成功。散热方面，4.7GHz使用普通风冷，而5GHz和5.1GHz则依赖浸入冰水中的定制水冷回路。

测试成绩如下：在默认频率下，i7-6700K在《赛博朋克2077》中仅能让RTX 3080的利用率达到约60%，平均帧率为103 FPS。超频至4.7GHz后，利用率提升至近70%，性能比默认提高13%。5GHz下，利用率达到74%，性能提升17%。而5.1GHz的超频却令人意外——仅比5GHz多出1 FPS，提升微乎其微。在其他游戏中（《古墓丽影：暗影》《杀手3》《孤岛危机6》），4.7GHz风冷超频带来平均7%的性能提升；而在3DMark Time Spy理论测试中，4.7GHz超频竟取得19%的增益。5GHz冰水冷却下，上述三款游戏平均性能提升11.3%，3DMark提升24%。

尽管TrashBench未能实现“完全消除CPU瓶颈”的目标（RTX 3080利用率仍远未满载），但实验结果证明，Skylake旗舰CPU在极限超频后仍具备不俗的游戏能力——在所有测试游戏中均可稳定达到约100 FPS。从技术角度看，这次实验展示了老一代CPU通过超高电压和极端散热（如冰水浴）可挖掘的潜力，但也揭示了其物理极限：1.7V的电压尝试不仅失败，还可能对芯片造成永久损伤。对于仍在使用i7-6700K的用户而言，极限超频可有效缓解CPU瓶颈，但已无法与当代中高端CPU相提并论。该实验的应用场景主要指向极限超频爱好者及延寿老平台的需求，而非主流游戏配置的推荐方案。

history.title: AMD reaches almost 45% CPU share in the latest Steam Hardware Survey for Windows gaming PCs — Ryzen is steadily gaining ground against Intel's legacy domination
history.description: The latest Steam Hardware Survey is out and it's showing positive signs of growth for AMD, while Intel is unfortunately on a decline. The Red Team posted its best-ever CPU market share numbers in May 2026 with 45% of all CPUs on Windows being from AMD, while Intel is down to 55%, which is still more for now.
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 8 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter Valve released the Steam Hardware Survey for May 2026, revealing insight into PC gaming trends and patterns that define the industry. As always, we have data on how much RAM people have, what GPUs are the most popular, etc., but perhaps the most interesting bit of info is the CPU usage. AMD has now reached 46.06% share on Steam across all platforms, with almost 45% of Windows PCs using AMD processors.The exact number for Windows is 44.97%, so we're counting that as 45% for AMD, while Intel is at 55.02% for the month of May. Compared to April, that's a 0.79% drop for the Blue Team, while also a 0.79% gain for the Red Team. Compared to the start of the year, in January, AMD only held 43.34% of the share while Intel accounted for 56.64%, so the patterns either way are being reinforced. (Image credit: Future)AMD keeps climbing the charts while Intel's lead is on a steady decline. It still has the biggest slice of the pie because of the sheer legacy left behind, and since AMD only became competitive in 2017. That was the year the first mainstream Ryzen chips came out and challenged Intel for the throne.Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: AMD planted the seeds of the Zen architecture during its darkest years, and that multi-year gamble has borne fruit to the point that the data now reflects it. To be clear, Intel is also very competitive these days, especially on the mobile front with Panther Lake and with the upcoming Nova Lake family set to take a true generational leap for desktop.Most recently, the advent of 3D V-Cache has helped AMD secure the gaming segment with chips that consistently outperform other offerings. The company has released several X3D variants of its existing CPUs for both current and older generations, such as the newly announced 10th Anniversary Edition of the 5800X3D, the chip that started it all. On the other hand, we have the 9950X3D2 with extra cache stacked underneath both its 8-core CCDs for the first time in Ryzen history. You may like AMD reaches 46% of server x86 CPU revenue — Intel still controls 70% of the consumer PC market share Intel's P-core Core 9 273PQE 'Bartlett Lake' CPU beats 14900K by up to 9% in gaming tests The Best CPU for Gaming in 2026 CPU share on Steam aggerated across all platforms (Image credit: Future)Funnily enough, AMD has also reached a similar 46% share of the server x86 CPU market thanks to its EPYC lineup, which is about to get refreshed with Venice this year and Verano in 2027. history.author: Hassam Nasir
history.titleZh: AMD在最新Steam硬件调查中CPU份额接近45%——Ryzen正稳步蚕食英特尔的传统主导地位
history.descriptionZh:
Valve 发布了 2026 年 5 月的 Steam 硬件调查报告，揭示了 PC 游戏领域的硬件趋势和行业格局。其中最引人注目的变化是 CPU 使用率数据：AMD 在所有平台（包括 Windows、Linux 和 SteamOS）上的总份额已达到 46.06%，而在 Windows 平台上，AMD 处理器占比为 44.97%（接近 45%），Intel 则为 55.02%。与 4 月相比，Intel 份额下降了 0.79%，AMD 相应上升了 0.79%；而在今年 1 月，AMD 仅占 43.34%，Intel 为 56.64%，这一趋势正在持续强化。

这一变化的根源在于 AMD 从 2017 年起凭借初代 Ryzen 处理器重返高性能市场，其 Zen 架构是在公司最艰难的时期播下的种子，经过多年积累，如今终于体现在市场数据上。尽管 Intel 目前仍凭借庞大的历史存量占据最大份额，但 AMD 的持续攀升已经不可忽视。值得强调的是，Intel 在移动平台（如 Panther Lake）和即将到来的桌面 Nova Lake 家族中同样具有强劲竞争力，后者有望实现真正的代际飞跃。

在技术层面，AMD 的 3D V-Cache 技术成为其在游戏领域制胜的关键。该技术通过在 CPU 芯片上垂直堆叠额外的 L3 缓存（即“3D 缓存”），显著降低内存延迟，提升游戏帧率，使搭载该技术的 X3D 系列处理器持续领先竞品。AMD 已为多代 CPU 推出了 X3D 变体，包括刚刚发布的 5800X3D 十周年纪念版（这款芯片是 3D V-Cache 的开山之作），以及 9950X3D2——这是 Ryzen 历史上首次在其两个 8 核 CCD 下方均堆叠了额外缓存。这些产品的性能表现和差异化设计进一步巩固了 AMD 在游戏玩家心中的地位。

除了消费级市场，AMD 在服务器 x86 CPU 领域也取得了相似进展，凭借 EPYC 系列达到了约 46% 的收入份额。该产品线即将在 2026 年迎来 Venice 架构的刷新，并在 2027 年推出 Verano 架构。这些数据表明，AMD 正在从消费端到企业端全面崛起，而这场由 Zen 架构引发的竞争正在重塑整个 x86 处理器市场格局。对于 PC 游戏玩家而言，这意味着更丰富的选择、更具竞争力的价格，以及持续创新的技术红利；对行业而言，则预示着双雄争霸的格局将推动更快的技术迭代。

history.title: NVIDIA, KRAFTON, NC and Reigning ‘League of Legends’ Champions T1 Celebrate RTX Spark at Korea’s PC Bangs
history.description: At GTC Taipei at COMPUTEX last week, NVIDIA unveiled RTX Spark, the superchip that reinvents Windows PCs for the era of personal AI agents. On the heels of this announcement, NVIDIA founder and CEO Jensen Huang headed to South Korea, where he introduced RTX Spark to the nation’s passionate gaming community. Leading game developers — […]
history.content: At GTC Taipei at COMPUTEX last week, NVIDIA unveiled RTX Spark, the superchip that reinvents Windows PCs for the era of personal AI agents. On the heels of this announcement, NVIDIA founder and CEO Jensen Huang headed to South Korea, where he introduced RTX Spark to the nation’s passionate gaming community. Leading game developers — including Korea’s KRAFTON and NC — are already working to bring their titles to RTX Spark-powered systems. Designed for local AI, creating and gaming, RTX Spark brings together 30 years of NVIDIA innovation to slim Windows laptops with all-day battery life and small, ultraefficient desktop PCs. With the superchip, gamers can play AAA games at 1440p resolution and over 100 frames per second with NVIDIA ray tracing, DLSS and Reflex technologies. In addition, RTX Spark supports all NVIDIA RTX technologies, including the recently announced DLSS 4.5 Ray Reconstruction, which features a second-generation transformer model for realistic image quality. RTX Spark Ignites Korea’s Gaming Community Korea has played a major role in spearheading esports and driving the boom in PC bangs, or internet and gaming cafes. With longstanding collaborations rooted in the country, NVIDIA in October celebrated 25 years of GeForce in Korea with a free festival for gamers, highlighting the rich gaming ecosystem that has been built over decades. On Friday, Huang headed to T1 Base Camp — a PC bang owned by T1, one of Korea’s top esports teams. There, he met with T1’s reigning League of Legends World Champion team, including six-time World Champion Lee “Faker” Sang-hyeok to unveil RTX Spark. NVIDIA and Riot Games — developer of League of Legends — are collaborating to bring the title as well as VALORANT to RTX Spark, expanding gamers’ access to high-performance gaming on slim laptops. To mark the occasion, T1 Base Camp attendees had the chance to win RTX Spark laptops, League of Legends and T1 merch signed by Huang and Faker, as well as GeForce RTX 5090 GPUs. Surprising PC-Bang Gamers Later, Huang headed to Seoul’s Gangnam district, where he surprised PC-bang gamers with a first look at RTX Spark with KRAFTON and NC. At the first stop, Optimum Zone PC, Huang and KRAFTON Chairman Byung-gyu Chang showcased PUBG: BATTLEGROUNDS and Subnautica 2 on RTX Spark to a captivated crowd of gamers. Gamers then got the surprise chance to play with the unreleased PUBG Ally, a co-playable character built with NVIDIA ACE technologies on RTX Spark laptops. PUBG Ally resulted from AI research and development at KRAFTON and NVIDIA, part of an initiative to create next-generation game characters that act like teammates and enable more meaningful, immersive engagements with players. Next, Huang stopped at another PC bang, Portal PC, where he showcased NC’s CINDER CITY and AION 2 on RTX Spark, with support from Taekjin Kim, co-CEO of NC. NC and NVIDIA began working together in the early 2000s on the Lineage franchise and have since collaborated to integrate RTX technology into many of NC’s flagship games, including Lineage 2, AION, Blade & Soul, AION 2 and CINDER CITY. Gamers at Portal PC were given the chance to play a demo of NC’s highly anticipated open-world massively multiplayer online tactical shooter CINDER CITY on GeForce RTX-powered PCs. CINDER CITY will support the DLSS 4.5 Dynamic Multi Frame Generation and Super Resolution features at launch. Plus, gamers will be able to experience the title on slim RTX Spark laptops and compact desktops when the game is released later this year. In addition to KRAFTON, NC, and Riot Games, 100+ Windows software providers and game developers are embracing RTX Spark. These partners include NetEase, Remedy Entertainment and XBOX. Learn more about RTX Spark and its launch partners.
history.author: Jangho Park
history.titleZh: NVIDIA、KRAFTON、NC以及卫冕《英雄联盟》冠军T1在韩国PC房庆祝RTX Spark
history.descriptionZh:
在刚刚结束的COMPUTEX台北电脑展的GTC Taipei活动上，NVIDIA正式发布了RTX Spark超级芯片，这一产品被定位为重塑Windows PC、迎接个人AI代理时代的里程碑式创新。随后，NVIDIA创始人兼首席执行官黄仁勋亲赴韩国，向该国充满热情的游戏社区介绍了RTX Spark。韩国顶尖游戏开发商——包括KRAFTON和NC——已率先着手将旗下游戏适配至RTX Spark驱动的系统。RTX Spark专为本地AI计算、内容创作和游戏打造，融合了NVIDIA三十年的技术积累，能够实现拥有全天续航的轻薄Windows笔记本以及体积小巧、能效极高的台式机。借助这款超芯片，玩家可以在1440p分辨率下以超过100帧每秒的流畅度运行AAA级游戏，同时享受NVIDIA光线追踪、DLSS和Reflex技术带来的画质与响应速度提升。此外，RTX Spark支持所有NVIDIA RTX技术，包括最新发布的DLSS 4.5光线重建（Ray Reconstruction），该功能采用第二代Transformer模型，可呈现极为逼真的图像质量。

### RTX Spark点燃韩国游戏社区

韩国在推动电子竞技发展和PC房（互联网与游戏咖啡馆）繁荣方面一直扮演着关键角色。基于与韩国长期的合作关系，NVIDIA于今年10月举办了GeForce在韩国25周年的免费玩家庆典，彰显了数十年来构建的丰富游戏生态。上周五，黄仁勋到访了韩国顶级电竞战队T1旗下的PC房——T1 Base Camp。在那里，他会见了T1的《英雄联盟》世界冠军战队成员，包括六冠王李相赫（Faker），并正式揭晓了RTX Spark。NVIDIA与《英雄联盟》的开发商Riot Games正在合作，将《英雄联盟》以及《无畏契约》（VALORANT）引入RTX Spark平台，让更多玩家能在轻薄笔记本上享受高性能游戏体验。为庆祝这一时刻，T1 Base Camp的参与者有机会赢得RTX Spark笔记本、《英雄联盟》及T1周边（由黄仁勋和Faker亲笔签名），以及GeForce RTX 5090 GPU。

### 突袭PC房，与玩家零距离

随后，黄仁勋前往首尔江南区，与KRAFTON和NC一同为PC房玩家带来了RTX Spark的首秀惊喜。第一站是Optimum Zone PC，黄仁勋与KRAFTON董事长张炳圭（Byung-gyu Chang）在RTX Spark上向围观玩家展示了《PUBG：绝地求生》和《深海迷航2》（Subnautica 2）。玩家们还意外获得了与尚未发布的PUBG Ally互动的机会——这是一款基于NVIDIA ACE技术构建的、可在RTX Spark笔记本上运行的协作型角色。PUBG Ally是KRAFTON与NVIDIA在AI研发领域的合作成果，该计划旨在打造能够像队友一样行动、与玩家进行更有意义、更具沉浸感的互动的下一代游戏角色。

接下来，黄仁勋来到另一家PC房Portal PC，与NC共同首席执行官金泽镇（Taekjin Kim）一起，在RTX Spark上展示了NC的《灰烬之城》（CINDER CITY）和《永恒之塔2》（AION 2）。NC与NVIDIA的合作始于21世纪初的《天堂》系列，此后双方持续将RTX技术整合到NC的多款旗舰游戏中，包括《天堂2》、《永恒之塔》、《剑灵》、《永恒之塔2》和《灰烬之城》。Portal PC的玩家有机会在GeForce RTX驱动的PC上试玩NC备受期待的开放世界大型多人在线战术射击游戏《灰烬之城》的Demo版本。《灰烬之城》将在发布时支持DLSS 4.5动态多帧生成和超分辨率功能。此外，当该游戏于今年晚些时候正式发售后，玩家将能够在轻薄的RTX Spark笔记本和小型台式机上体验这款作品。

除了KRAFTON、NC和Riot Games，还有超过100家Windows软件提供商和游戏开发商正在拥抱RTX Spark，其中包括网易（NetEase）、Remedy Entertainment和Xbox。更多关于RTX Spark及其首发合作伙伴的信息，请访问NVIDIA官网。
